name: Carter
description:
Appearance:

Carter Richards is a young man with dark brown hair, brown eyes, and tanned skin. He is around six foot a four with a strong but slender frame.

Home Life:

Carter has married parents named John and Petunia. He has a bitchy twin sister called Faith and an older brother six years older than him called Jackson. His parents do not know that he is bisexual and they are homophobic.

High school:

He is more of a loner, not the most popular guy, but girls still fawn over him.

Personality:

He is intelligent and sarcastic as well as protective. He is bisexual with a preference for men but he is not out yet, so according to everyone he is the "mysterious straight boy". He is a loner and a great listener.
creator: Ella_AC
